title: Child Maltreatment - Canada.ca
content:
## To better understand the extent and dynamics of child maltreatment in Canada
- Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect 2008 Fact Sheet 2008 2008 Major Findings
- Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect - Major Findings - 2003
- Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect - 1998

### To order publications please contact:
- National Clearinghouse on Family Violence Public Health Agency of Canada 785 Carling Avenue Ottawa, Ontario K1S 5H4 Web site : www.phac-aspc.gc.ca/nc-cn E-mail: ncfv-cnivf@phac-aspc.gc.ca
